fields.name: Occurrences
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of times the combination of fault code, symptom code, fault area, and resolution code occurs in the posted service lines.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the relationship between the fault code and the resolution code.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service item group linked to the relationship.
